mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOMPI_DIARY ( DIARY_ID, HOMPI_ID, FOLDER_ID, DIARY_CONTENT, AVAIL_STATUS, INSERT_USER_ID,DIARY_NAME ) VALUES ( #{diaryId}, #{hompiId}, #{folderId}, #{diaryContent}, #{availStatus}, #{insertUserId}, #{diaryName} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE DIARY_CONTENT = #{diaryContent}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{insertUserId}, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
